instruction: You are playing the ViZDoom basic scenario. Watch the first-person view and the on-screen HUD (health, ammo), and shoot the monster to maximize reward.

You are playing the ViZDoom deathmatch scenario. Watch the first-person view and the on-screen HUD (health, armor, current weapon and ammo, and the ARMS panel showing which weapons you own). Switch to a suitable weapon with SELECT_WEAPON1-6 or SELECT_NEXT_WEAPON, navigate, and fight to maximize kills.
